title: ### **Abstract Curved and Bracketed Designs**
content:
### **Abstract Curved and Bracketed Designs**
```
- { ... { 4 _ } ~ { _bloom ...} -
- { ... { 4 _ } ~ { _bloom ...} -
- { ... ~4 _ ~ } ~ { ~ _bloom ~ ...} -
```

---
## **3. Advanced Encoded & Cyberpunk Variations**

### **Terminal-Log Style Variants**
```
| [ 4.BLOoM::4 ] | [ 4.BLOoM::4 ] |
| [ …4_BLOoM…4_ ] | [ …4_BLOoM…4_ ] |
→ |[ ...4 _ ] | [ BlooM ... ]| →
... [ 4 | _ [b1o ] | [0m ]] ... [ 4 | _
```

---
## **4. Leetspeak Variations**

### **Standard Leetspeak:**
```
1. 48|00^^
2. 48|00|\/|
3. 48|00(V)
4. 48|00^^^
```

### **More Encoded Variants:**
